purpose: A single notification entry shown in a Notifications popover or inbox. Contains title, description, timestamp, priority, author, and optional actions. Read/unread state visible.
whenToUse: Inside a Notifications popover from ShellBar
As a message center entry for user alerts
For workflow tasks awaiting user action
whenNotToUse: For inline alerts on a page — use MessageStrip
For a system-wide banner — use NotificationBanner
For a list of business objects — use StandardListItem or ObjectListItem
doRules: Show unread indicator (dot or bold) prominently on left
Include relative timestamp ('2 hours ago') for freshness
Provide primary action button (Approve / View / Reply)
Group by priority or category if list is long
dontRules: Do not use color alone for priority — pair with icon or label
Do not truncate the title without an ellipsis affordance
Do not stack too many actions per item — max 3, others in overflow menu
Do not hide the source/author — always visible in dense mode

layoutGuidance.placement: Inside Notifications popover, notification inbox page
layoutGuidance.alignment: Unread indicator left · title+description middle · time+actions right

contentGuidance.labelLength: Title ≤ 80 chars; description ≤ 200 chars; author ≤ 40 chars
contentGuidance.contentRules: Title is the event; description is context; time is relative
examples: Purchase Order PO-48865 approved · by Nadia · 2h ago

requirements: Unread state via icon or text, not color alone
aria-label combines title + author + time for full context
